channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken bottles, 23rd June
item.description:
Broken bottles in the walk through from Lucy Way to rail sidings rd. Broken they have been for three days and not been cleared.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 16 Melbourne Grove-bin needs to be emptied, 23rd June
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bags and rubbish, 23rd June
item.description:
Junction of Rail Sidings Rd and Lucey way service rd. Rubbish has accumulated over the last couple of weeks. Attracting rats and foxes. This is a known dumping spot so why is it not regularly patrolled and cleared. Your operators cleared a pile just 75 yards away the other day yet left this here when it would have been clearly visible to them. Why ??

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Rail Sidings Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grove Vale-next to phone shop- bin needs to be emptied, 23rd June
item.description:
Bins needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 21 Grove Vale-bin needs to be emptied, 23rd June
item.description:
Bin needs emptying.

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, dumped bags, 23rd June
item.description:
Over a week ago someone has fly tipped/ dumped these bags at the end of Queenscroft Road. Can they please be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queenscroft Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Derwent Grove Bus Stop B-Bin Overflowing with Waste near Childcare Facilities-2nd Complaint, 23rd June
item.description:
2nd Complaint: Bin is still not emptied. Health and safety danger particularly as it is right in front of a childcare facility.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Dulwich Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Household rubbish left, 23rd June
item.description:
Household rubbish and furniture left stacked behind bins (already tagged as containing the incorrect refuse) in the shared land behind Number 3/4 Harrier Mews

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrier Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three blocked drains, 23rd June
item.description:
Blocked with debris/ silt following torrential rain on 22 or 23 June.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
